title: lannea obovata
intro: Lannea obovata, also known as the sour plum, is a species of plant in the Anacardiaceae family, commonly found in tropical Africa. The medicinal properties of Lannea obovata include its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating various health conditions. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including its ability to lower blood sugar levels, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of malaria. Herbal preparations of Lannea obovata can be made into a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits, and the plant's fruit can also be eaten raw.
